title: Harbour Heights
subtitle: Luxury residential tower, Bahrain Bay
description: Harbour Heights is a landmark 35-storey residential tower positioned on the waterfront of Bahrain Bay. ASK was appointed as the exclusive leasing and property management partner for the entire development — 180 luxury apartments ranging from studios to four-bedroom penthouses with panoramic views of the Arabian Gulf.

title: Harbour View
subtitle: Mixed-use development, Seef District
description: Harbour View combines 98 serviced residential apartments with 22 commercial units across two interconnected towers in the Seef District. ASK managed the full Owners' Association setup under RERA regulations, ongoing FM services, and the short-term hospitality lettings programme for the furnished residential floors.

title: Harbour Row
subtitle: Boutique villa community, Amwaj Islands
description: Harbour Row is an intimate gated community of 32 luxury villas on Amwaj Islands, each designed with private pools and direct beach access. ASK was retained as the exclusive sales agent for off-plan and completed units, achieving 100% sell-through within 14 months of launch through our investor and HNW client network.

title: Curv Mall
subtitle: Retail and F&B destination, Seef
description: Curv Mall is a modern retail destination spanning 64 commercial units across three levels in the heart of Seef. ASK holds the commercial leasing mandate and manages the Owners' Association and facility services for the common areas. The centre hosts international F&B brands, lifestyle retail and medical clinics.

title: Meliá Bahrain
subtitle: 5-star hotel residences, Manama
description: ASK is the appointed property management and hospitality lettings partner for the branded residences within the Meliá Bahrain hotel complex in central Manama. We manage 96 fully furnished hotel-branded apartments on behalf of the individual unit owners, operating the short-stay programme and distributing returns on a monthly basis.
